title: Plots Near Airport Nagpur — MIHAN Corridor Investment 2025
metaTitle: Plots Near Airport Nagpur | MIHAN Corridor Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA approved plots near Nagpur airport and MIHAN. Sumthana, Jamtha, Khapri, Dabha. Starting ₹22 Lakh. 90% bank finance. Mahalaxmi Infra.
author: Mahalaxmi Infra

content.text: Plots near Nagpur's Dr. Babasaheb Ambedkar International Airport sit at the heart of the city's most dynamic growth zone. The airport, combined with the MIHAN SEZ, has created a real estate hotspot that continues to attract buyers and investors from across Maharashtra.

content.heading: Which Areas Are Closest to Nagpur Airport?
content.text: The localities closest to Nagpur's international airport include Sumthana, Jamtha, Khapri, Dabha, and Beltarodi. All of these sit on or near the Wardha Road corridor which leads directly to the airport. Mahalaxmi Infra has active projects in Sumthana (Mahalaxmi Nagar 45) and Jamtha (Mahalaxmi Nagar 42) — both NMRDA sanctioned and RERA approved.

content.heading: Why Airport Proximity Drives Property Values
content.text: Airport proximity drives property values for several reasons — high workforce demand from airport and MIHAN employees, connectivity to the expressway network, and the prestige of the address. Areas within 5–10 km of Nagpur airport have seen 25–35% annual appreciation over the last three years as MIHAN operations have expanded.

content.heading: Airport Road Nagpur — Property Overview
content.text: Airport Road in Nagpur connects the city to the terminal and passes through several residential localities. Properties on Airport Road have seen consistent appreciation and strong buyer demand. For plots specifically, NMRDA-approved layouts along Airport Road offer good investment value with bank finance eligibility.

content.heading: Plots in Khapri and Dabha Near Airport
content.text: Khapri and Dabha are two localities on the airport corridor that offer slightly more affordable alternatives to the premium Sumthana and Jamtha zones. Buyers who want airport proximity without paying peak MIHAN prices should consider Khapri and Dabha as strong alternatives.

Plots near Nagpur airport are among the city's strongest investment options in 2025. The MIHAN effect has created a self-sustaining demand engine that will continue driving values higher. Mahalaxmi Infra has NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved projects in Sumthana and Jamtha starting from ₹22 Lakh.
